article_id: Article 10
text_snippet: Until [a] Procurator General is designated, the current functionaries performing in the respective area are invested with the attributions that Article 246 determines.

article_id: Article 10. Of the Proscription of Slavery and Other [Forms of] Servitude
text_snippet: Slavery, personal servitude, and the trafficking [trata] of the persons are proscribed. The law may establish social responsibilities [cargas] in favor of the State.

article_id: Article 105. Of the Prohibition of Double Remuneration
text_snippet: No person may perceive as [a] functionary or [a] public employee, more than one salary or remuneration simultaneously, with the exception of those coming from the exercise of teaching.

article_id: Article 106. Of the Responsibility of the Functionary and of the Public Employee

article_id: Article 107. Of the Freedom of Competition [Concurrencia]
text_snippet: All persons have the right to dedicate themselves to the legal economic activity of their preference, within a regime of equal opportunities. Competition at the market is guaranteed. The creation of m

article_id: Article 108. Of the Free Circulation of Products
text_snippet: The goods of national production or fabrication, and those coming legally from abroad, will freely circulate within the territory of the Republic.

article_id: Article 109. Of Private Property

article_id: Article 11

article_id: Article 11. Of the Deprivation of Liberty
text_snippet: No one will be deprived of their physical freedom or brought to justice [procesado], except for mediating the causes and within the conditions established by this Constitution and the laws.

article_id: Article 110. Of Copyrights and Intellectual Property
text_snippet: All authors, inventors, producers, or merchants [comerciantes] will enjoy the exclusive property of their work, invention, brand or commercial name, in accordance with the law.

article_id: Article 117. Of the Political Rights

article_id: Article 118. Of Suffrage

article_id: Article 119. Of Suffrage Concerning the Intermediate Organizations
text_snippet: For the elections in the intermediate, political, syndical and social organizations, the same principles and norms of suffrage will be applied.

article_id: Article 12
text_snippet: The current seats of the Delegations of [the] Government, will pass of plain right and gratuitously to be the property [propiedad] of the departmental governments.

article_id: Article 12. Of Detention and of Arrest

article_id: Article 121. Of the Referenda
text_snippet: The legislative referendum, decided by the law, can or may not be binding. This institution will be regulated by law.

article_id: Article 127. Of Compliance with the Law
text_snippet: All persons are obligated to comply with the law. The free criticism of the law [is permitted], but it is not permitted to advocate [predicar] its disobedience.

article_id: Article 128. Of the Primacy of the General Interest and of the Duty to Collaborate

article_id: Article 139. Of the Symbols

article_id: Article 14
text_snippet: The vesting of Senator for Life extends to the citizen exercising the presidency of the Republic at the date of sanction of this Constitution, without benefiting any previous one.

article_id: Article 14. Of the Non-retroactivity of the Law
text_snippet: No law may have a retroactive effect, unless it is more favorable to the accused [encausado] or the convicted.

article_id: Article 142. Of the Denunciation of the Treaties

article_id: Article 147. Of the Non-Deprivation of the Natural Nationality
text_snippet: No natural Paraguayan will be deprived of their nationality, but they may voluntarily renounce to it.

article_id: Article 15
text_snippet: Until a new National Constituent Convention meets, those who participated in it will enjoy the title [trado] of “Cuidadano Convencional” [Citizen Member of the Convention].

text_snippet: No one may take the law into their own hands or claim their rights with violence. However, the right to legitimate defense is guaranteed.

article_id: Article 16

article_id: Article 47. Of the Guarantees of Equality

text_snippet: The union in matrimony of a man and a woman is one of the fundamental components in the formation of a family.

text_snippet: The parents have the right and the obligation to assist, to feed, to educate, and to shelter [amparar] their minor children. The law will punish them in the case of non-fulfillment of their duties of

article_id: Article 54. Of the Protection of the Child
text_snippet: The family, the society, and the State have the obligation of guaranteeing the child his harmonious and complete [integral] development, as well as the full exercise of his rights, protecting him agai

article_id: Article 55. Of Maternity and Paternity
text_snippet: Responsible maternity and paternity will be protected by the State, which will promote the creation of [the] necessary institutions to these ends.

article_id: Article 56. Of Youth
text_snippet: The conditions for an active participation of youth in the political, social, economic, and cultural development of the country shall be promoted.

article_id: Article 57. Of the Senior Citizens [Tercera Edad]
text_snippet: All senior persons have the right to a complete [integral] protection. The family, the society, and the public powers will promote their well-being through social services that see to [fulfilling] the

article_id: Article 58. Of the Rights of Exceptional People
text_snippet: For exceptional persons, the care of their health, of their education, of their recreation and of their professional training for a complete [integral] social integration is guaranteed. The State will

article_id: Article 59. Of the Family Asset
text_snippet: The family asset is recognized as an institution of social interest whose regime will be determined by the law. It will be constituted by the family housing [vivienda] or the estate [fundo], and by it

article_id: Article 6. Of the Quality of Life

article_id: Article 60. Of the Protection against Violence
text_snippet: The State shall promote policies having the purpose of avoiding violence in the family environment and other destructive causes of its solidarity.

article_id: Article 61. Of Family Planning and of Maternal-Child Health [Care]

article_id: Article 62. Of the Indigenous Peoples and the Ethnic Groups
text_snippet: This Constitution recognizes the existence of the indigenous peoples, defined as groups of [a] culture prior to the formation and the organization of the Paraguayan State.

article_id: Article 63. Of the Ethnic Identity

article_id: Article 66. Of the Education and Assistance

article_id: Article 67. Of the Exoneration
text_snippet: The members of the indigenous peoples are exonerated from providing [prestar] [the] social, civil or military services, as well as from the public responsibilities [cargas] established by the law. Cha

article_id: Article 7. Of the Right to a Healthy Environment
text_snippet: Everyone has the right to live in a healthy and ecologically balanced [equilibrado] environment. The preservation, the conservation the re-composition and the improvement of the environment, as well a

article_id: Article 70. Of a the Social Welfare Regime
text_snippet: The law will establish programs of social welfare through strategies based on health education and on community participation [participación comunitaria].

article_id: Article 71. Of the Drug Trade, of Drug Addiction and of Rehabilitation

article_id: Article 75. Of Educational Responsibility

article_id: Article 76. Of the Obligations of the State
text_snippet: Elementary [básica] school education is obligatory. In the public schools it will have a gratuitous character. The State shall promote middle, technical, agricultural, industrial, and superior or univ

article_id: Article 77. Of Teaching in the Native [Materna] Language

article_id: Article 78. Of the Technical Education
text_snippet: The State shall promote preparation for work through technical education, in order to form the human resources required for the national development.

article_id: Article 8. Of Environmental Protection
text_snippet: The law will regulate the activities susceptible of producing [an] environmental alteration. In the same way [asimismo], it may restrict or prohibit those [activities] that it qualifies as dangerous.

article_id: Article 82. Of the Recognition of the Catholic Church
text_snippet: The predominant role [protagonismo] of the Catholic Church in the historical and cultural formation of the Nation is recognized.

article_id: Article 83. Of Cultural Diffusion and Exemption from Taxes

article_id: Article 84. Of the Promotion of Sports

article_id: Article 85. Of the Minimum Budget
text_snippet: The resources destined to education in the General Budget of the Nation will not be lower than 20 percent of the total assigned to the Central Administration, loans and donations excluded. Chapter VII

article_id: Article 86. Of the Right to Work
text_snippet: All the inhabitant of the Republic have the right to a legal job, freely chosen and to realize it in dignifying and just conditions. The law will protect work in all its forms and the rights that it g

article_id: Article 87. Of Full Employment
text_snippet: The State shall promote policies that tend to the full employment and to the professional training of human resources, giving preference to national workers.

article_id: Article 88. Of Nondiscrimination
text_snippet: No kind of discrimination will be admitted between the workers for motives of ethnic, gender [sexo], age, religion, social status and political or syndical preferences. The work of persons with limita

article_id: Article 89. Of the Work of Women
text_snippet: The workers of both sexes have the same labor rights and obligations, but maternity will be subject to special protection, that will include the assistance services and the corresponding leaves of abs

article_id: Article 9
text_snippet: The members of the Jury of Prosecution [Enjuiciamiento] of Magistrates will be designated on proposal of the respective powers within the sixty days of the promulgation of this Constitution. Until the

article_id: Article 9. Of the Freedom and of the Security of the Persons
text_snippet: All persons have the right to be protected in their freedom and in their security. No one may be obligated to do what the law does not mandate nor be prevented from what it does not prohibit.

article_id: Article 90. Of the Work of Minors
text_snippet: Priority will be given to the rights of working minors to guarantee their normal physical, intellectual and moral development.

article_id: Article 91. Of the Working Days [Jornadas] and of Resting Days
text_snippet: The maximum duration of the ordinary working day will not exceed eight daily hours and 48 weekly hours, of daytime, except those legally established for special motives. The law will establish more fa

article_id: Article 92. Of the Remuneration of the Work
text_snippet: The workers have right to enjoy a remuneration that assures, them and their families, of a free and dignifying life. The law will consecrate the minimum and mobile living wage [salario vital], the ann

article_id: Article 93. Of the Additional Benefits to Workers
text_snippet: The State will establish a regime of stimulus for the enterprises that encourage their workers with additional benefits. Such additional remunerations [emolumentos] will be independent from the respec

article_id: Article 94. Of Stability and of Indemnification
text_snippet: The right to stability of the workers is guaranteed within the limits established by the law, as well as their right to indemnification in the case of unjustified dismissal.

article_id: Article 95. Of Social Security
text_snippet: The law will established the obligatory and complete [integral] system of social security for the dependent workers and their families. Its extension will be promoted to all the sectors of the populat

article_id: Article 96. Of the Syndical Freedom
text_snippet: All workers[,] public and private[,] have the right to organize themselves in trade unions [sindicatos] without a prior authorization. The members of the Armed Forces and of the Police Forces are exce

article_id: Article 97. Of the Collective Agreements [Convenios]
text_snippet: The trade unions [sindicatos] have the right to promote collective actions and to concur in [concertar] agreements on the conditions of work. The State will favor conciliatory solutions of the conflic

article_id: Article 98. Of the Right to Strike and to Lock-out [Paro]
text_snippet: All the workers of the public and private sectors have the right to invoke [recurrir] the strike in the case of conflict of interests. The employers enjoy the right of lock-out in the same conditions.
